## FakeEventPersister Class

Fake implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventPersister](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.events.ieventpersister 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventPersister') for unit testing\.
